ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "drug_form" TEXT /* Form of the drug (e.g., Oral Tablet, Oral Capsule) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the drug */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drug */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the drug was approved for use */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the drug (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "indications" TEXT /* Indications for the use of the drug */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the use of the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_drug_form FOREIGN KEY ("drug_form") REFERENCES drug_forms ("form_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_dosage FOREIGN KEY ("dosage") REFERENCES drug_dosages ("dosage_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drugs_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES drug_manufacturers ("manufacturer_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "formularies" (
  "formulary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulary */,
  "formulary_name" TEXT /* Name of the formulary */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider who uses the formulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formulary */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the formulary */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the formulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formularies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formulary_drugs" (
  "formulary_drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formulary-drug relationship */,
  "formulary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formulary */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drug in the formulary (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the status change */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the status */,
  "restriction_type" TEXT /* Type of restriction on the drug (e.g., Prior authorization, Quantity limit) */,
  "restriction_description" TEXT /* Description of the restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formulary_drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulary_drugs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formulary_drugs_formulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulary_id") REFERENCES formularies ("formulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "formulary_drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formulary-drug relationship */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change (e.g., Brand Deletion, Add Generic) */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Addition, Deletion, Update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_formulary_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulary_drug_id") REFERENCES formulary_drugs ("formulary_drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pharmacist, administrator, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "alternate_drugs" (
  "alternate_drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternate drug entry */,
  "formulary_drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formulary-drug relationship */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alternate drug */,
  "alternate_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the alternate drug selection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alternate_drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternate_drugs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alternate_drugs_formulary_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulary_drug_id") REFERENCES formulary_drugs ("formulary_drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generic_drugs" (
  "generic_drug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generic drug */,
  "drug_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drug */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Name of the generic drug */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the generic drug was approved for use */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the generic drug */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generic_drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generic_drugs_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug form (e.g., Oral Tablet, Oral Capsule) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_dosages" (
  "dosage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug dosage */,
  "dosage_value" TEXT /* Value of the dosage */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dosage (e.g., MCG, MG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dosage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., pharmacist, administrator, data analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "formulary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formulary */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_formulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("formulary_id") REFERENCES formularies ("formulary_id")
)
